title: Nutty Crumbly Norwegian Turmeric
description: A nutty and crumbly brunch dish featuring turmeric powder that's both friendly and flavorful.

ingredients.name: 3 tablespoons grated ginger
ingredients.notes: Make sure to peel the ginger first.

ingredients.name: 1 cup almond flour
ingredients.notes: Ensure it's sifted for a smoother texture.

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons unsalted butter, melted
ingredients.notes: Use it to grease a baking dish for better results.

ingredients.name: 1 tablespoon fresh lemon juice
ingredients.notes: To balance the spiciness and sweetness.

instructions: Grease a small baking dish with melted butter.
In a mixing bowl, combine grated ginger, almond flour, honey, salt, and lightly beaten eggs. Mix well until everything is evenly distributed.
Fold in finely chopped pecans and lemon juice into the mixture.
Pour the batter into the greased baking dish and smooth out the top with a spatula.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown and firm to the touch.
Allow it to cool slightly before serving. It's best enjoyed warm or at room temperature.
